title: Create Unlimited
body:
# Create Unlimited
A simple Create addon that removes the ~~very obviously unfair~~ limits that they put on their mod. (basically a remake of tizu69's old Create NTL but slightly better)


features include placing funny/cursed train tracks, putting (almost) anything into copycat blocks, infinite reach with extendo grips, ~~and much more~~.

also you can make bigger curves with it (which is helpful for all you train recreation people out there)

!["you definitely shouldn't be doing that" -tropheusj](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1077790150958010369/1125428509158953031/image.png)

_what the create devs think of this mod_

also join our discord [https://discord.gg/GeGm3DRDWY](https://discord.gg/GeGm3DRDWY "discord")
